acceptance_criteria: AO provides CLI verbs to search, install, list, update, and publish skills against a registry-compatible API.
Skill resolution supports clear precedence across bundled, user-managed, and workspace-local skill directories.
Installed skills are tracked with a lockfile containing version and integrity metadata for reproducible environments.
Update workflows include dry-run/force semantics and detect local divergence before overwrite.
Security controls exist for untrusted skills, including review guidance and configurable trust/allowlist policy hooks.
description:
AO should support a first-class skill ecosystem with discoverable, versioned skill bundles and deterministic local installs so teams can reuse agent capabilities safely.

Implementation boundary: AO CLI and runtime skill lifecycle; excludes desktop shell integrations.
title: Add versioned AO skill registry workflows with install/update/publish
